command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2stQR1ySY2c4Vud.1719b3382959 --database RGtcxHR8RPxZsqyxZLCcuq --execute 
-- Step 1: Seed market_profiles from existing markets (use same IDs to simplify mapping)
INSERT INTO market_profiles (id, name, state, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  (1, 'Asheville', 'NC', 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
  (2, 'Myrtle Beach', 'SC', 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
  (3, 'Catskills', 'NY', 'active', NOW(), NOW()),
  (30001, '30A', 'FL', 'active', NOW(), NOW());

-- Step 2: Add marketProfileId column to users
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN marketProfileId INT NULL;

-- Step 3: Add FK constraint
ALTER TABLE users ADD CONSTRAINT fk_users_marketProfileId FOREIGN KEY (marketProfileId) REFERENCES market_profiles(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;

-- Step 4: Copy existing marketId values to marketProfileId (IDs match since we used same IDs)
UPDATE users SET marketProfileId = marketId WHERE marketId IS NOT NULL;
